title: International Collaboration Center
content: International Collaboration Center ICC of Jaypee University of Information Technology, Waknaghat has to provide all facilitations for the admission of foreign students in different programmes of Engineering and Sciences and to collaborate with foreign Institutions of repute for joint research and teaching. The ICC promotes interdisciplinary research where faculty from various departments/Institutions works together. ICC intends to reduce the research gap by making a synergy with the ongoing advanced research at the institutes in the foreign countries. The high-quality publications through the collaborative research activities is our focus to enhance the ranking of JUIT at world level and spread the name of JUIT among overseas universities to attract best talents for academics. Vision: To accomplish all possibilities for recognition of JUIT as state of the art destination for study for international students and researchers. The ICC is committed to provide all facilitations and resources for it. Mission: To develop International tie-ups through joint teaching, and research collaborations with overseas Institutes of repute. Functional aspects of ICC : Work on international collaborations for tie-up of Advanced Research Centres in R&D. Students Exchange Program with foreign universities. Increasing collaboration in holding international workshops, seminars, conferences. Developing interphase for advance workshops/ training/projects and IPR activities. Working on collaborative and joint internationally funded research projects. Establishing tie-ups with SAARC nation’s universities of repute and ranking. Mentoring of International students for academics, personal and cultural aspects. Contact us at : internationaloffice@juitsolan.in
